title: Welcome to ACAI Studio
text: This is the member documentation hub for ACAI Studio. Here you’ll find everything you need to make the most of your membership — from onboarding guides to studio policies and shared resources.

Contact — How to reach the team and get support

title: Welcome to ACAI Studio
text:
About ACAI Studio
ACAI Studios & Gallery is a nonprofit community ceramics studio that promotes and preserves ceramic and other arts through facilities, equipment, education, and gallery exhibits. We inspire creativity through ceramic arts in the Sacramento region.

title: Policies
text: Please read all policies before your first session. Members are expected to follow these guidelines to ensure a safe, productive environment for everyone.

title: Policies
text:
Booking & Cancellations
Placeholder: Rules around advance booking, cancellation windows, no-show consequences, and waitlist procedures.

Bookings must be made at least X hours in advance.
Cancellations within X hours of a session may incur a fee.
Repeated no-shows may result in booking restrictions.

title: Policies
text:
Studio Access & Hours

Studio hours: Monday–Saturday, 10:00am–5:00pm
Gallery hours: Wednesday–Friday, Noon–4:00pm; Saturday, 11:00am–3:00pm
Studio members have 24/7 facility access.
